title: lycopodium selago var. densum
intro: Lycopodium selago var. densum, also known as Spiny Club Moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago var. densum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues, including bronchitis, asthma, and skin conditions.
